title: cryptostylis sororia
intro: Cryptostylis sororia, also known as the Australian ground orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its unique, ground-dwelling habit and is native to Australia and New Zealand. The roots of Cryptostylis sororia are used in traditional medicine, particularly in Australia, and have been reported to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which are believed to offer health benefits, including antioxidant and immune-boosting effects.
